assessment.note: He names a specific growth gap: positive feedback on craft exists, but he lacks clarity on what differentiates him at the next level; [THREAD-DEFERRED] 'what separates me at the next level' merits a later drill, but the drill cap forces stage progression.

new_queue.label: Stretch now
new_queue.name: Which part of your current work is actually stretching you right now?
new_queue.description: Distinguishes comfort-zone execution from genuine growth moments.

new_queue.label: Current footing
new_queue.name: What's feeling solid in your role right now, Toby?
new_queue.description: Opens with a calm read on where Toby feels grounded before moving into stretch.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Named destination
new_queue.name: What kind of design work would make the next step feel real for you?
new_queue.description: Gets beyond abstract ambition into the concrete scope Toby wants next.

new_queue.label: Sponsorship need
new_queue.name: What kind of sponsorship would help you take a more visible strategic position?
new_queue.description: Lets Toby name the support he needs without assuming the answer is confidence or capability.

new_queue.label: Next commitment
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks a useful test of this growth contract?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete near-term experiment that makes the conversation actionable.
